narrative:
Ramy Rabia is a centre-back for Egypt, boasting an overall rating of 7.2/10. This places him in the top 4% of centre-backs at this tournament, with a rating range of 6.82–7.58. His performance at this World Cup accounts for 27% of his current rating, having played 368 minutes.

Rabia exhibits significant defensive strength, averaging 1.957 tackles and an impressive 5.625 clearances per 90 minutes. He also contributes with 0.978 interceptions per 90, demonstrating his ability to disrupt opposition play. His offensive metrics are low, with only 0.036 expected goals and 0.018 expected assists per 90 minutes.

Rabia serves as a key defensive lynchpin for his national team, with 73% of his rating stemming from club form. Scouts should closely monitor his continued defensive consistency, particularly his high volume of clearances and tackles. Fans can anticipate his vital role in neutralizing opponent threats in Egypt's upcoming matches.
